untranslatable_reason: Diamond Bottom pattern requires visual/structural pattern recognition (connecting highs and lows, trend line analysis, volume slope over multiple bars) which cannot be expressed using only point-in-time price/volume indicators and basic operators. The pattern definition involves geometric relationships and multi-bar trend analysis that exceed the capability of the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted approximate translation using high volume breakout (volume > prev_volume) and upside breakout (close > prev_high) as proxies for the pattern's key characteristics, but this does not capture the essential diamond shape formation, trend line connections, or the gradual volume decline from left to right. A proper implementation would require custom pattern recognition logic or structural candle analysis.
